cases.reason: After visiting /loyalty-catalog (PTS prices confirmed on cards), navigating to /catalog showed USD prices ($124.00) on product cards, product links used /product/ prefix (not /loyalty-catalog/), SearchProducts GraphQL request carried currencyCode=USD, no console JS errors. No loyalty currency leakage.
cases.evidence: network req #77: SearchProducts currencyCode=USD; DOM product price $124.00

cases.reason: GetCategory (loyalty-scoped) on /loyalty-catalog carried currencyCode=PTS and productFilter='price.PTS:(0 TO)'. Response had no errors[]. Category sidebar rendered 'Accessories' and 'Loyalty products'. No JS errors.
cases.evidence: network req #70: GetCategory variables.currencyCode=PTS, productFilter=price.PTS:(0 TO); response data.childCategories has 2 children, no errors key

cases.reason: GetProductRecommendations (model=related-products) on loyalty PDP carried currencyCode=PTS. Response had no errors[] (clean data). No related-products widget rendered (empty products[] — N/A per @needs-test-data). No 4xx/5xx. No JS errors.
cases.evidence: network req #101: GetProductRecommendations model=related-products currencyCode=PTS; response data.recommendations.products=[] no errors

cases.reason: GetProductRecommendations (model=bought-together) carried currencyCode=PTS. Response had no errors[], returned 2 products. 'Customers bought together' widget rendered in DOM showing PTS120.00/PTS150.00 (NOT USD). No 4xx/5xx. No JS errors.
cases.evidence: network req #102: GetProductRecommendations model=bought-together currencyCode=PTS; DOM widget shows PTS120.00; response prices formattedAmount=PTS120.00

cases.reason: Clicking 'Loyalty' menuitem in main navigation bar navigated to /loyalty-catalog. Product grid rendered (50 results), breadcrumb shows 'Loyalty catalog', SearchProducts and GetCategory loyalty-scoped calls carried currencyCode=PTS. Console had 2 image 404s (missing CMS asset) — not JS errors.
cases.evidence: URL=/loyalty-catalog after click; network req #132 SearchProducts currencyCode=PTS; heading 'Loyalty catalog 50 results'

cases.reason: Sidebar 'Accessories 45' link href=/loyalty-catalog/accessories (correctly namespaced under /loyalty-catalog/). Navigated to /loyalty-catalog/accessories — sub-category page loaded with URL /loyalty-catalog/accessories, heading 'Accessories 45 results'. Product cards showed PTS120.00/PTS150.00 (not USD). SearchProducts carried currencyCode=PTS and filter=price.PTS:(0 TO). GetCategory carried currencyCode=PTS. Product card links: /loyalty-catalog/product/... (correctly namespaced). No 4xx/5xx on graphql calls. Console: 2 image 404s (same benign CMS asset), no JS errors.
cases.evidence: network req #195: SearchProducts variables.currencyCode=PTS, filter=price.PTS:(0 TO); network req #192: GetCategory currencyCode=PTS; DOM product card: PTS120.00/PTS150.00; URL=/loyalty-catalog/accessories

cases.reason: On loyalty PDP breadcrumb: 'Loyalty catalog' crumb href=/loyalty-catalog (not /catalog). 'Catalog' crumb href=/catalog and category crumbs un-namespaced are known current behavior per [NOTE] in assertions — not asserted. Navigating to /loyalty-catalog returned the loyalty catalog product grid (50 results) with PTS prices (PTS64.00/PTS80.00). SearchProducts carried currencyCode=PTS. Zero console errors on the /loyalty-catalog page after breadcrumb navigation.
cases.evidence: DOM breadcrumb: e156 link 'Loyalty catalog' /url=/loyalty-catalog; network req #76: SearchProducts currencyCode=PTS; DOM product PTS64.00; console: 0 errors
